_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to ensure security practices are followed throughout the acquisition process.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to evaluate the regulatory implications of proposed data processing activities, AI system deployments, or business model changes, providing compliance risk assessment before implementation.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-A-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-004 (SP, cosine: 0.530), SP-S-003 (SP, cosine: 0.509).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.4/10 (raw 0.244). Shared vocabulary: [ability]. DCWF-only terms [acquisition, ensure, followed, practices, process, security] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, ai, assessment, business, changes, compliance] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.886 (P=0.905, R=0.868). P exceeds R by 0.038 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 24 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (89.4%). "Ability to ensure security practices are followed throughout the acquisition pro" and "Ability to evaluate the regulatory implications of proposed data processing acti" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.547 > STS 0.244 (gap +0.303). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ability] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.4%. Shared tokens: [ability]. DCWF-only: [acquisition, ensure, followed, practices, process, security]. WIDAI-only: [activities, ai, assessment, business, changes, compliance].
